summary: Tested Phase 3 UI Simplification - Persona-Based Navigation Platform. Admin sidebar navigation works correctly with 7 sections, Turkish characters, and directAccessOnly items hidden. Critical issue: Agency dashboard and ReservationsPage crash with React errors causing blank pages.

ui_bugs.issue: React component error crashes agency dashboard - shows blank page
React component error crashes reservations page - shows blank page after navigation

integration_issues.issue: Login succeeds but dashboard crashes immediately with WeeklySummaryTable error

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix WeeklySummaryTable component error that crashes agency dashboard
CRITICAL: Fix ReservationsPage component error that crashes when navigating to /app/reservations
Add error boundaries to prevent full page crashes from component errors
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation structure is correctly implemented with 7 admin sections
Turkish character encoding is working properly (ş, ç, ı, ö, ü, İ, Ş, Ü)
directAccessOnly items correctly filtered from sidebar
SİSTEM & GELİŞMİŞ section correctly hidden (showInSidebar: false)
data-testid attributes properly set on all sidebar sections and links
Missing error boundaries in page components causing full page crashes

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Navigation works but page components crash

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin sidebar navigation verified working with 7 sections. Agency login works but dashboard crashes. ReservationsPage crashes on navigation. These are React component errors, not navigation issues. The navigation module refactoring (persona-based navigation) is correctly implemented.

features_verified.admin_sidebar_7_sections: PASSED - All 7 sections visible: DASHBOARD, OPERASYON, REZERVASYONLAR, MÜŞTERİ & ACENTA, FİYATLANDIRMA, RAPORLAR, AYARLAR
features_verified.turkish_characters: PASSED - ş, ç, ı, ö, ü, İ, Ş, Ü all display correctly
features_verified.direct_access_only_hidden: PASSED - 8/8 directAccessOnly items correctly hidden from sidebar
features_verified.sistem_gelismis_hidden: PASSED - SİSTEM & GELİŞMİŞ section not visible in sidebar
features_verified.admin_login: PASSED - Admin can login and see dashboard
features_verified.agency_login: PARTIAL - Login succeeds but dashboard crashes
features_verified.backward_compat_routes: BLOCKED - Cannot test due to page component crashes
features_verified.data_testid_attributes: PASSED - All sections have proper data-testid attributes

console_errors_observed: An error occurred in the <WeeklySummaryTable> component
An error occurred in the <ReservationsPage> component
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 (multiple)
